headline: Haaland Is Quietly Building a Tech Empire From Norway
dek: Erling Haaland scores for Manchester City and invests in health and performance tech startups from his home country — building a portfolio designed to outlast his boots.

headline: Mbappé Is Building a Business Empire at 27
dek: Kylian Mbappé owns a football club, runs a film production company, and controls his own image rights — all while playing for Real Madrid.

headline: The World Cup Winner Who Became a VC
dek: Mario Götze has 70+ startup bets, two unicorns, and a portfolio built entirely while still playing football.

headline: Gerard Piqué Is Rebuilding Football From the Ground Up
dek: Kings League has gone from a viral experiment to a €200M media and sports property.

headline: Lewis Hamilton Is Betting on What Comes After the Podium
dek: From Formula 1 to non-alcoholic spirits and film — Hamilton's off-track empire is accelerating faster than anything he's done behind the wheel.
